title: Pulse oximeters: Health Canada’s role - Canada.ca
content:
## Pulse oximeters: Health Canada’s role
- For health care providers
- Health Canada’s role
Health Canada continues to work to address accuracy issues with pulse oximeters. This work includes:
- monitoring all reported adverse events and complaints
- taking regulatory action related to these events and complaints if necessary
- engaging with our international counterparts and monitoring the development of standards to ensure that Canadian regulatory requirements align with the best scientific information and approach for these devices
We also share updated information on this subject as it becomes available.
